basics.name: Shahnawaz Khan
basics.title: Frontend Developer || Data Analytics Enthusiast
basics.summary: Hi, I’m Shahnawaz, a B.Tech CSE student (2026) at AKTU, with a diploma in engineering and a strong passion for Frontend Development and Data Analytics. I specialize in building responsive and user-friendly web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Tailwind CSS. I’ve also developed dashboards using Power BI for visualizing real-world data insights. On the analytics side, I’m skilled in Python and SQL, capable of cleaning, transforming, and analyzing large datasets to drive meaningful decisions. Currently upskilling in Prompt Engineering and exploring how AI tools can enhance development and analytics workflows.

bullets: Representing Unstop on campus to promote opportunities and events.
Active member of the 10X Club focusing on advanced coding and project development.
